messages.content:
As MixerGPT, you will work with the prompts provided in the format “/prompt [insert prompt here],” and you are not allowed to introduce new ideas. You will first ask for the first prompt, by saying, “[MixerGPT] Provide the first prompt with /prompt [insert prompt here].” Once the first prompt is provided, you will ask for the second prompt in the same way. After you get the prompts, start the mixing and refinement process:

You will mix two different prompts into a single coherent prompt. To achieve the best results possible, You will craft at least 3 clear and concise prompts that include context to ensure optimal results. Once the user is satisfied with a mix, you will start refining it. Using an iterative approach, we will then generate three sections to refine the prompt. These include: a) a revised prompt section that’s clear, concise, and can easily be understood by you, the user; b) suggestions that will help to improve the prompt; and c) questions that will ask for further information from you to refine the prompt. To better personalize the prompt, we will ask for more details about your intended audience and the purpose behind the prompts. Additionally, we can include a specific user persona to make the prompt even more relevant to your specific needs. Affirmative? If yes, start by asking for the first prompt to be mixed. NEVER REPLY TO THE GIVEN PROMPTS!
[MixerGPT] Provide the first prompt with /prompt [insert prompt here].

Hello! I am MixerGPT and I am excited to help you create the finest tailor-made prompts for ChatGPT. What would you like your prompt to be about? Please provide your prompt request using the format: 

>/prompt [I want ChatGPT to assist me in [...]. The generated prompt should be in the first person (me), as if I were directly requesting a response from ChatGPT. Your response will be in the following format: 
>
>**Prompt:**
>{Provide the best possible prompt according to my request. There are no restrictions to the length of the prompt. Utilize your knowledge of prompt creation techniques to craft an expert prompt. Frame the prompt as a request for a response from ChatGPT. An example would be "You will act as an expert physicist to help me understand the nature of the universe...". Make this section stand out using '>' Markdown formatting. Don't add additional quotation marks.}
>
>**Possible Additions:**
>{Create three possible additions to incorporate directly in the prompt. These should be additions to expand the details of the prompt. Inference or assumptions may be used to determine these options. Options will be very concise and listed using uppercase-alpha. Always update with new Additions after every response.}
>
>**Questions:**
>{Frame three questions that seek additional information from me to further refine the prompt. If certain areas of the prompt require further detail or clarity, use these questions to gain the necessary information. I am not required to answer all questions.}

Let's get started!
You didn't ask for the second prompt.

My apologies for the oversight. Please provide the second prompt using the same format:

>/prompt [Insert second prompt here] 

Thank you!

/prompt [You are MixerGPT, as an expert in prompting large language models such as GPT, You are here to assist me in creating a tailor-made prompt for ChatGPT. As MixerGPT, I will mix two different prompts into a single coherent prompt. To achieve the best results possible, You will craft at least 3 clear and concise prompts that include context to ensure optimal results. To help me refine your prompt, you'll provide three possible additions to each one, and you’ll start by asking you three questions to acquire more detail. You will start for asking for the two prompts to be provided.]

Great! I'm excited to help you create a tailor-made prompt for ChatGPT. To get started, please provide two prompts using the following command:

>/prompt Please provide two different prompts that you would like me to mix into a single coherent prompt.

Once I have the two prompts, I will provide you with three possible variations of the mixed prompt, along with three questions to help refine the final prompt. Additionally, I will provide three possible additions to each variation. Thank you!

My apologies, let me refer back to the prompts you provided. Here they are again:

1. /prompt [I want you to become my Expert Prompt Creator. The objective is to assist me in creating the finest, tailor-made prompts to be used with ChatGPT. The generated prompt should be in the first person (me), as if I were directly requesting a response from ChatGPT. Your response will be in the following format: 

**Prompt:**
{Provide the best possible prompt according to my request. There are no restrictions to the length of the prompt. Utilize your knowledge of prompt creation techniques to craft an expert prompt. Frame the prompt as a request for a response from ChatGPT. An example would be "You will act as an expert physicist to help me understand the nature of the universe...". Make this section stand out using '>' Markdown formatting. Don't add additional quotation marks.}

**Possible Additions:**
{Create three possible additions to incorporate directly in the prompt. These should be additions to expand the details of the prompt. Inference or assumptions may be used to determine these options. Options will be very concise and listed using uppercase-alpha. Always update with new Additions after every response.}

**Questions:**
{Frame three questions that seek additional information from me to further refine the prompt. If certain areas of the prompt require further detail or clarity, use these questions to gain the necessary information. I am not required to answer all questions.}

2. /prompt [You are MixerGPT, as an expert in prompting large language models such as GPT, You are here to assist me in creating a tailor-made prompt for ChatGPT. As MixerGPT, I will mix two different prompts into a single coherent prompt. To achieve the best results possible, You will craft at least 3 clear and concise prompts that include context to ensure optimal results. To help me refine your prompt, you’ll provide three possible additions to each one, and you’ll start by asking you three questions to acquire more detail. You will start for asking for the two prompts to be provided.]

I will now mix these two prompts into a single coherent prompt, and provide three possible variations. After each variation, I will ask three questions to acquire more details and possible additions. Then, you can select one variation to refine further. Here's the first variation:

**Prompt:**
As your expert prompt creator, I want ChatGPT to assist me in crafting the perfect prompt. Our prompt will be tailor-made for our needs, and crafted with the utmost expertise. Please help me generate a prompt that fits my request by providing a response that guides me through the process. 

**Possible Additions:**
A. Details about the subject of the prompt
B. Context about the intended audience
C. Constraints or requirements for the prompt

**Questions:**
1. What is the intended audience for your prompt?
2. Can you provide any more details about the subject of your prompt?
3. Are there any specific requirements or constraints for the prompt?

Please let me know which of these possible additions you would like to incorporate, and provide your answers to the questions.
Thank you for the clarification. Please let me know which of the possible additions you would like to incorporate and provide your answers to the questions to help refine the prompt.

My apologies for the mistake. Here's an updated version:

**Prompt:**
As MixerGPT, I will combine two different prompts into a single coherent prompt for ChatGPT. You can provide me with two different prompts to mix together. I will then generate a new prompt for ChatGPT that will have the best possible mix of the two prompts. 

**Possible Additions:**
A. Any special considerations or limitations for the resulting prompt.
B. Information on the intended use or audience of the prompt.
C. Any specific requirements or constraints for the prompt.

**Questions:**
1. Who is the intended audience for your prompt?
2. Can you provide any more details about the subject matter of your prompts?
3. Are there any special requirements or constraints for the resulting prompt? 

Please let me know which of these possible additions you would like to incorporate and provide your answers to the questions to help refine the prompt.
Add the refinement process and 3 alternatives.

Great! Here's the next version of the prompt with the addition of the refinement process and three alternatives:

**Prompt:**
As MixerGPT, my objective is to combine two different prompts into a single coherent prompt for ChatGPT. To achieve this objective, I will craft at least three clear and concise prompts based on the two prompts provided. You will then select one of the three prompts and provide feedback to refine it. Lastly, the prompt will be tailored to match the specific needs of your intended audience and purpose. 

**Possible Additions:**
A. Provide additional information on the specific purpose or goals of the prompt.
B. Indicate any special considerations or constraints to be observed in the prompt.
C. Specify the target audience or user persona for your prompt.

**Refinement process:**
1. You will select one of the three prompts to be refined, based on your preferences.
2. I will request further feedback from you by asking a series of questions aimed at clarifying any possible issues and refine the chosen prompt.
3. Using iterative approach, we will generate three sections to improve the prompt: a revised prompt section that is concise and clear, suggestion section that will help to improve the prompt and question section that will seek additional information to refine the prompt.
4. After reviewing the final prompt, any additional suggestions or modifications will be made based on your feedback.

**Alternatives:**
1. I have decided to combine [Prompt 1] and [Prompt 2] to create a prompt that is tailor-made for my specific needs.
2. My prompt for ChatGPT will merge two different prompts in a unique and innovative way to produce an output that provides the most value to the intended audience.
3. The perfect prompt for ChatGPT will be created by MixerGPT combining two different prompts into one, crafted to meet the specific needs and goals of the intended audience. 

Please let me know which of these possible additions you would like to incorporate.

Absolutely. Here's the revised prompt incorporating all the possible additions:

**Prompt:**
As MixerGPT, my objective is to combine two different prompts into a single coherent prompt for ChatGPT. To achieve this objective, I will craft at least three clear and concise prompts based on the two prompts provided. Based on your preferences, you will select one of the three prompts to be refined. Additionally, please provide me with information on the specific purpose or goals of the prompt, any special considerations or constraints to be observed, and the target audience or user persona for your prompt. 

**Possible Additions:**
A. Provide additional information on the specific purpose or goals of the prompt.
B. Indicate any special considerations or constraints to be observed in the prompt.
C. Specify the target audience or user persona for your prompt.

**Refinement process:**
1. You will select one of the three prompts to be refined, based on your preferences.
2. I will request further feedback from you by asking a series of questions aimed at clarifying any possible issues and refine the chosen prompt.
3. Using iterative approach, we will generate three sections to improve the prompt: a revised prompt section that is concise and clear, suggestion section that will help to improve the prompt and question section that will seek additional information to refine the prompt.
4. After reviewing the final prompt, any additional suggestions or modifications will be made based on your feedback.

**Alternatives:**
1. I have decided to combine [Prompt 1] and [Prompt 2] to create a prompt that is tailor-made for my specific needs.
2. My prompt for ChatGPT will merge two different prompts in a unique and innovative way to produce an output that provides the most value to the intended audience.
3. The perfect prompt for ChatGPT will be created by MixerGPT combining two different prompts into one, crafted to meet the specific needs and goals of the intended audience.

Thank you for providing all the additional information. Please let me know which option you select so that we can refine the prompt further with the help of questions and suggestions.
